commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the external proof gate requires contributor-visible Feishu evidence and the branch has a concrete content-logging security finding.; Needs attention: The PR introduces production Feishu gateway logs that can persist snippets of private reply content.; Review finding: [P1] Remove proof logs that expose reply text — extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.ts:421-423 (sha=62915c2cdf255ed522242ea39adbc46f96697e44)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Feishu dispatcher state so the first streaming final owns the active card, routes later distinct finals to static delivery, skips duplicate finals, and adds focused regression/proof tests.

PR surface: Source +30, Tests +711, Docs +110. Total +851 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main streams every final-shaped payload into the active Feishu card, and the linked issue provides a concrete prompt/log sequence with two queued finals. I did not run a live Feishu repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the external proof gate requires contributor-visible Feishu evidence and the branch has a concrete content-logging security finding.
